mapper.select:
SELECT notice_sn, notice_title, use_yn, data_reg_id, TO_CHAR(data_reg_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS data_reg_dt FROM co_notice_m WHERE use_yn = 'Y'
AND notice_title ILIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND notice_cn ILIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY notice_sn DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM co_notice_m WHERE use_yn = 'Y'
AND notice_title ILIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
AND notice_cn ILIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'

SELECT notice_sn, notice_title, notice_cn, use_yn, data_reg_id, TO_CHAR(data_reg_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS data_reg_dt, data_chg_id, TO_CHAR(data_chg_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS data_chg_dt FROM co_notice_m WHERE notice_sn = #{noticeSn}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO co_notice_m ( notice_sn, notice_title, notice_cn, use_yn, data_reg_id, data_reg_dt ) VALUES ( nextval('seq_co_notice_m'), #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeCn}, #{useYn}, #{dataRegId}, NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE co_notice_m SET notice_title = #{noticeTitle}, notice_cn = #{noticeCn}, use_yn = #{useYn}, data_chg_id = #{dataChgId}, data_chg_dt = NOW() WHERE notice_sn = #{noticeSn}
mapper.select: SELECT notice_sn, notice_title, use_yn, data_chg_id, TO_CHAR(data_chg_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS data_chg_dt FROM co_notice_m WHERE use_yn = 'N' ORDER BY data_chg_dt DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE co_notice_m SET use_yn = 'Y', data_chg_id = #{dataChgId}, data_chg_dt = NOW() WHERE notice_sn = #{noticeSn}
UPDATE co_notice_m SET use_yn = 'N', data_chg_id = #{dataChgId}, data_chg_dt = NOW() WHERE notice_sn = #{noticeSn}
